title: Play Army Soldier Set for Kids Combat Mission Toy Set with Accessories Plastic Toy Soldier Figure with Handcuffs Grenades Gun Imaginative Role Play for Children Indoor Outdoor UK
features: ACTION-PACKED PLAY – Ignite your child’s imagination with this Play Army Soldier Set, complete with a beige and green toy soldier, realistic toy gun, grey handcuffs, grenades, and explosives. Every piece encourages storytelling and dynamic role play, drawing children into exciting combat mission scenarios that foster creative thinking and group play with friends or siblings.

SAFE AND CHILD-FRIENDLY – Thoughtfully designed for children aged 3 and above, all toys in this combat mission set are made from sturdy plastic, sized for little hands at 10–15 cm for figures and approximately 12–15 cm for accessories. The smooth edges, bright colouring, and orange safety tips on the toy gun ensure a secure and enjoyable playing experience both indoors and outdoors.

REALISTIC MILITARY DETAILS – The beige soldier figure features dark green vest details and black boots, enhancing role-playing experiences with authentic visual appeal. Accessories like the olive green toy gun, grey handcuffs and grenades, plus realistic explosive props help to immerse children in lifelike missions, sparking vibrant adventures and detailed imaginative stories.

PERFECT FOR ROLE PLAY – Whether defending a base or staging a daring rescue, this combat mission toy set supports creative play essential for children’s early social skills and communication. Perfectly suited to both solo adventures and group missions, the set is ideal for young commanders seeking interactive fun, making everyday play sessions come alive.

IDEAL GIFT FROM ELECTOYS – Designed to inspire, this Play Army Soldier Set is a fantastic gift choice for birthdays or holidays, delighting children who enjoy action-packed scenarios and military figures. Each set includes all pictured accessories, helping little ones build their own epic stories. From Electoys, suitable for ages 3+, pack contents as shown.
description: Product description Take imaginative play to new heights with the Play Army Soldier Set for kids, a complete combat mission toy set designed for young adventurers. Included are a beige and green plastic soldier figure with lifelike dark green vest and black boots, a toy gun and ammunition in classic olive green with orange tips for safety, as well as grey handcuffs, grenades, and realistic explosive props. This action-packed set invites children aged 3 and over to dive into engaging role play, creating stories, and staging missions that develop their teamwork and communication skills. The toy figures and accessories are perfectly sized for small hands (10–15 cm for soldiers, 12–15 cm for add-ons), ensuring comfort and suitability for children. The durable construction and smooth edges provide peace of mind for parents, making the set ideal for both indoor adventures and safe outdoor fun in gardens or playgrounds across the UK. Vibrant colours and realistic military detailing make every mission and rescue scenario visually captivating, while the included accessories allow children to act out scenes from their imagination or favourite stories. As children invent their own combat adventures, they'll enjoy hours of energetic storytelling and pretend play. The Play Army Soldier Set by Electoys is a great gift idea for birthdays, rewards, or festive occasions, offering fun as well as developmental benefits. Each set contains all accessories shown, supporting young ones’ journeys into imaginative worlds, suitable for ages 3 and up. Safety Warning Keep away from fire
